videos.headline: Georgia Southern draws first blood with 60-yard rushing touchdown
videos.description: Logan Wright bursts through the middle for a huge touchdown run to put the Eagles up late in the first quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Georgia Southern draws first blood with 60-yard rushing touchdown) 2021/10/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Arkansas State answers quickly with a 10-yard touchdown pass
videos.description: James Blackman connects with Corey Rucker to tie the game at 10 apiece.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Arkansas State answers quickly with a 10-yard touchdown pass) 2021/10/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Arkansas State reclaims the lead late in the 2nd quarter
videos.description: James Blackman and Corey Rucker connect for their second pitch-and-catch touchdown of the evening.

videos.headline: Justin Tomlin's 15-yard rushing touchdown puts Eagles up big
